text.message: Soloing me while green has road and red has army on lock is pretty wild
That was literally the first time I robbed you
Green was at 4 and you were at 3 with two down devs
Alright well you don’t have to worry I’ll just be robbing red the entire game now
Yup, and red keeps soloing me so thank him
Same IQ as you do soloing me
u cant win  if green wins first
So green can win, I don’t care
Thanks I reported him long ago
Reported me for what? Making the same blocks as red did?
Oh you mean how green has no ore and red just traded it to him?
i cant take roads if u block my wood or brick red... block 6 wheat
We have to take road from him
If blue would’ve had any IQ he would’ve built another road on wood 5 and plowed greens next settle
lol you’re the one talking about reporting. True cry baby
